text.*:
Reborn-One Hundred (RE/100) (リボーンワンハンドレッド, Ribōn Wan Handoreddo?) is a line of Gunpla established in 2014 that featured certain Universal Century mobile suits in 1/100 scale, but separate from the Master Grade (MG) line as well as the discontinued 1/100 High Grade line. While sharing the same 1/100 scale, RE/100 kits have less detail and articulation, such as simple inner frames and static hands.

The RE/100 line is intended for kits that were either too large (such as the MSN-04II Nightingale) or too obscure (Gundam MK-III) to be released in a MG form. Since it has less detailing than MG kits, RE/100 kits are more cost-effective and are somewhere in-between the MG line and the regular 1/100 No-Grade line kits in terms of pricing.[1].

Following the reorganization of Bandai Namco Group, box covers of reissue and future release of kits from September 2018 onwards feature blue Bandai logo instead of the original red logo, while releases and reissues from mid-2022 onwards feature the Bandai Namco logo on the upper right corner.

Lineup[]

  • Regular
  • Exclusives

RE # Model Series Yen Price Release Date Notes Link
001 MSN-04II Nightingale Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack - Beltorchika's Children ¥8,000 2014 September First Reborn-One Hundred released, and the first release from the Universal Century timeline. First and currently the only RE/100 kit to use MP2 plate runner. Largest and most expensive RE/100 kit. Neck accommodates Gunpla LED Unit (sold separately). Manual
002 MSF-007 Gundam Mk-III Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam Variations ¥3,500 2015 January Manual
003 RX-78GP04G Gundam GP04G Gerbera Gundam Evolve: 04 – RX-78 GP03 Dendrobium ¥3,500 2015 April Manual
004 MSK-008 Dijeh Mobile Suit Zeta Gundam ¥3,500 2015 June First release from the canonical UC timeline. Uses the H plate runner of MG-187 for weapons. Manual
005 MS-08TX[EXAM] Efreet Custom Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥3,500 2016 April Includes a booklet containing Chapter 3 of the Blue Destiny Vol. 1 manga. Manual
006 AMX-107 Bawoo Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥3,500 2016 November First transformable/separable kit in the series. Also the first RE/100 kit to have bilingual Japanese/English text on its box packaging and instruction manual. Manual
007 AMX-103 Hamma-Hamma Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥4,700 2017 July Includes four clear display stands for Wire-Guided 3-Barrel Beam Guns/Claws. Manual
008 MSA-005K Guncannon Detector Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥4,000 2018 February Includes 170mm cannon for the P-Bandai exclusive MG MSA-003 Nemo (Unicorn Desert Color Ver.). Manual
009 XM-07 Vigna-Ghina Mobile Suit Gundam F91 ¥3,200 2018 June First release from the Late Universal Century timeline. Released as part of Bandai's "UC NexT 0100" project. Includes two different cockpit hatches. Manual
010 MSN-03 Gyunei Guss's Jagd Doga Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥4,500 2018 September Released to commemorate the 30th anniversary of Char's Counterattack and as part of Bandai's "UC NexT 0100" project. Includes effect parts for funnels. Manual
011 LM111E02 Gun EZ Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥3,500 2018 December Uses G and H plate runners of MG-127 for frame and beam shield effect part. Released as part of Bandai's "UC NexT 0100" project and to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Victory Gundam. Manual
012 XM-07B Vigna-Ghina II Gundam F91 Mobile Suit Variations ¥3,700 2019 May Parts and color variant of RE-009. Manual
013 MS-06FZ Zaku II FZ Mobile Suit Gundam 0080: War in the Pocket ¥3,500 2019 July Uses no polycaps. Includes additional head parts to create Commander Type and Type-B variants. First 1/100 scale Gunpla kit ever to have hands where the back of the hand substitutes the palm, similar to a High Grade model, rather than having the usual complete hands. Released to commemorate the 30th anniversary of Gundam 0080. Manual

N/A Expansion Funnel Set for MG Sazabi Ver.Ka & RE/100 Nightingale Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack - Beltorchika's Children ¥1,700 2015 July P-Bandai exclusive accessory kit for RE-001. Also compatible with MG-175.
N/A Gundam GP04G Gerbera Clear Color Ver. Gundam Evolve: 04 – RX-78 GP03 Dendrobium ¥3,500 2016 August Gunpla Expo World Tour Japan 2016 Summer [Ikebukuro] exclusive clear color variant of RE-003.
N/A MS-08TX/S Efreet Schneid Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥3,500 2016 September P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-005. Manual
N/A AMX-107R Rebawoo Mobile Suit Gundam UC: One of Seventy Two ¥4,200 2017 February P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-006. Uses the J, K, M, and O plate runners of MG-167. Includes additional water slide decal sheet. Manual

Manual

N/A MS-08TX[EXAM] Efreet Custom [Clear Color] Mobile Suit Gundam Side Story: The Blue Destiny ¥3,500 2017 August The Gundam Base exclusive clear color variant of RE-005 to promote "Gundam Build Fighters World".
N/A AMX-107 Bawoo Mass Production Type Mobile Suit Gundam ZZ ¥3,500 2017 September P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE-006. Manual
N/A MSA-005K Guncannon Detector (Z-MSV Ver.) Zeta Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥3,800 2018 April P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-008. Manual
N/A MSF-007-8 Gundam Mk-III Unit 8 Anaheim Laboratory Log ¥3,500 2018 June P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE-002. Includes water slide decal sheet. Manual
N/A Type89 Base Jabber Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥3,000 2018 October P-Bandai exclusive release. Requires three Action Base 1 or Action Base 4 units for aerial poses. Manual
N/A XM-07S Vigna-Ghina (Berah Ronah Special) Gundam F91 Mobile Suit Variations ¥4,000 2018 November P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-009. Manual
N/A MSN-03 Quess Air's Jagd Doga Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥4,500 2019 January P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE-010 with new head parts; Beam Assault Rifle replaced by Mega Gatling Gun. Includes additional "Sleeves" parts to create MSN-03 Jagd Doga (Unicorn Ver.), which also requires right arm and backpack parts from P-Bandai exclusive MG AMS-119 Geara Doga (Unicorn Ver.) (sold separately). Manual
N/A LM111E03 Gun Blaster Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥3,500 2019 March P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE-011 with new parts. First press release includes additional water slide decal sheet for mobile suits from Victory Gundam in MG and RE/100. Released to commemorate the 25th anniversary of Victory Gundam. Manual
N/A Type89 Base Jabber (Unicorn Ver.) Mobile Suit Gundam Unicorn ¥3,000 2019 April P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE/100 Type89 Base Jabber. Requires three Action Base 1 or Action Base 4 units for aerial poses. Manual
N/A LM111E02 Gun EZ Ground Type Victory Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥3,500 2019 June P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-011. Includes water slide decal sheet. Manual
N/A XM-07G Vigna-Zirah Mobile Suit Gundam Silhouette Formula 91 in UC 0123 ¥4,000 2019 November P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-009. Includes Gundam-type head parts and water slide decal sheet. Manual
N/A LM111E02 Gun EZ Prototype (Rollout Color) Victory Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥3,500 2020 January P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-011. Includes water slide decal sheet.
N/A ZMT-S12G Shokew Mobile Suit Victory Gundam ¥3,800 2020 May P-Bandai exclusive release. Includes swappable camera eyes. Manual
N/A LM111E02 Gun EZ Ground Type (Bluebird Team Colors) Victory Gundam Mobile Suit Variations ¥3,500 2020 July P-Bandai exclusive color variant of RE/100 LM111E02 Gun EZ Ground Type. Includes water slide decal sheet. Manual
N/A XM-07B Vigna-Ghina II [Jupiter Battle Ver.] Mobile Suit Crossbone Gundam: Steel 7 ¥4,200 2021 April P-Bandai exclusive re-release of RE-012 with Snake Hand. Manual
N/A XM-07 Vigna-Ghina [Extra Finish] Mobile Suit Gundam F91 ¥6,400 2021 July P-Bandai exclusive metallic color variant of RE-009.
N/A AMX-107L-2 Gundam Lindwurm Gundam Build Divers Genius Head Line ¥5,000 2022 February P-Bandai exclusive parts and color variant of RE-006. First release from the Gundam Build Divers series. Manual
N/A MSN-03 Gyunei Guss's Jagd Doga [Special Coating] Mobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack ¥9,500 2022 November Gundam Side-F exclusive metallic color variant of RE-010.
N/A XM-02 Den'an-Gei Mobile Suit Gundam F91 ¥3,000 2025 October P-Bandai exclusive release. Includes foot cover parts and alternative cockpit hatch part. First new kit after a 3-year hiatus.

Yen price excluding 8% tax (10% from 2019 October onwards).

Notes & Trivia[]

  • During the early conception phase of this line there was a picture of potential model kit candidates which consist of:
    • MS-08TX［EXAM］ Efreet Custom (2016 RE/100 release)
    • RGM-79SP GM Sniper II (2017 MG release)
    • RMS-154 Barzam
    • RGM-89 Jegan (2018 MG release)
    • NZ-666 Kshatriya
    • RX-105 Ξ Gundam (HF)
    • ZMT-S34S Rig Contio
    • OZ-06MS Leo
    • ZGMF-X88S Gaia Gundam
    • CB-0000G/C Reborns Gundam
